chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.166 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of case. 22.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. PG Sindh. ------------------------------- Applicants appearing in person are called absent. No intimation is received. The applicants have impugned the order dated 02.01.2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge in Cr. Misc. Application No.2461 of 2022 filed by the applicants directing the SHO concerned to provide police protection to the applicants in accordance with law against illegal harassment by the three proposed accused. The remaining pleas of the applicants pertain to a dispute with regard to property which suggests that the matter in respect of the remaining reliefs is civil in nature. Giving the above observation, this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed. J U D G E Asif
